item.title: Version 2.0.30
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.30

Features

  • Robust Resource Discovery: Implemented a multi-strategy bundle resolution system that ensures the editor and renderer can find their assets across production, development, and testing environments.
  • Markdown Note Linking: Integrated support for internal note links (`shadow-note://`) within the web-based markdown renderer.
  • DBML Diagram Support: Added high-fidelity rendering for Database Markup Language (DBML) schemas directly inside your notes.
  • Immersive WebView: Refined local scheme handling to support secure HTTPS origins, enabling robust YouTube iframe embeds and cross-origin asset loading.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Build Pipeline: Fixed a critical issue in the production build script where resource bundles were being omitted from the final application package.
  • Stability: Enhanced snapshot testing reliability with correct bundle resolution for XCTest runners.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout performance for complex notes.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.26.

item.title: Version 2.0.29
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.29

Features

  • Robust Resource Discovery: Implemented a multi-strategy bundle resolution system that ensures the editor and renderer can find their assets across production, development, and testing environments.
  • Markdown Note Linking: Integrated support for internal note links (`shadow-note://`) within the web-based markdown renderer.
  • DBML Diagram Support: Added high-fidelity rendering for Database Markup Language (DBML) schemas directly inside your notes.
  • Immersive WebView: Refined local scheme handling to support secure HTTPS origins, enabling robust YouTube iframe embeds and cross-origin asset loading.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Build Pipeline: Fixed a critical issue in the production build script where resource bundles were being omitted from the final application package.
  • Stability: Enhanced snapshot testing reliability with correct bundle resolution for XCTest runners.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout performance for complex notes.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.26.

item.title: Version 2.0.27
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.27

Features

  • Robust Resource Discovery: Implemented a multi-strategy bundle resolution system that ensures the editor and renderer can find their assets across production, development, and testing environments.
  • Markdown Note Linking: Integrated support for internal note links (`shadow-note://`) within the web-based markdown renderer.
  • DBML Diagram Support: Added high-fidelity rendering for Database Markup Language (DBML) schemas directly inside your notes.
  • Immersive WebView: Refined local scheme handling to support secure HTTPS origins, enabling robust YouTube iframe embeds and cross-origin asset loading.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Build Pipeline: Fixed a critical issue in the production build script where resource bundles were being omitted from the final application package.
  • Stability: Enhanced snapshot testing reliability with correct bundle resolution for XCTest runners.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout performance for complex notes.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.26.

item.title: Version 2.0.26
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.26

Features

  • Bundle Resilience: Fixed a critical startup crash in environments with missing resource bundles by implementing a robust, crash-proof bundle search strategy.
  • Markdown Note Linking: Integrated support for internal note links (`shadow-note://`) within the web-based markdown renderer.
  • DBML Diagram Support: Added high-fidelity rendering for Database Markup Language (DBML) schemas directly inside your notes.
  • Immersive WebView: Refined local scheme handling to support secure HTTPS origins, enabling robust YouTube iframe embeds and cross-origin asset loading.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Stability: Enhanced snapshot testing reliability and synchronized view rendering callbacks for a smoother UI experience.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout performance for complex notes.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.25.

item.title: Version 2.0.25
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.25

Features

  • Premium Update Strategy: Shadow now handles updates silently in the background. It automatically checks for new versions every 24 hours and downloads them so they're ready the next time you launch the app.
  • Elite Shortcut Recording: Overhauled the shortcut recorder with an immersive, VS Code-inspired UI that captures keys in real-time.
  • Hotkey Suppression: Global shortcuts are now automatically paused during recording to prevent accidental triggers while configuring your hotkeys.
  • Shortcut "Steal" Logic: Assigning a hotkey that is already in use will now automatically disable the previous shortcut to avoid conflicts.
  • Premium UI Overhaul: Re-engineered the Shortcuts Settings with high-fidelity keycap aesthetics, balanced layouts, and smooth glassmorphism effects.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Stability: Improved hotkey registration reliability and prevented accidental system-wide triggers during configuration.
  • WebView Performance: Refined rendering for markdown accordions, tables, and task lists.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.24.

item.title: Version 2.0.24
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.24

Features

  • Shortcut Customization: Implemented a new, immersive shortcut recorder (VS Code style) with support for editing any global hotkey and automatic conflict resolution ("steal" logic).
  • Global Shortcut Management: Added individual toggles for all system-wide shortcuts, allowing granular control over system interactions.
  • Premium Shortcuts UI: Overhauled the settings interface with a balanced layout, high-fidelity keycap aesthetics, and refined glassmorphism cards.
  • WebView Enhancements: Premium accordion styling for <details>/<summary>, modernized tables with zebra striping, and custom task list checkboxes.
  • Knowledge Library Navigation: Added navigation history support and internal note linking ([[Note Title]]) for better movement within the library.
  • Diagramming Support: Full DBML rendering support and improved Graphviz/Mermaid integration in the WebView renderer.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Hotkey Suppression: Prevented global hotkeys from triggering while recording new combinations.
  • Snapshot Stability: Improved reliability of UI snapshot tests and view rendering callbacks.
  • Legacy IFrame Fixes: Resolved origin and playback issues for external iframes (YouTube).
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.23.

item.title: Version 2.0.23
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.23

Features

  • Global Shortcut Toggles: Control each system-wide hotkey individually with new enable/disable toggles in Settings.
  • Premium Shortcuts UI Overhaul: Redesigned the shortcuts settings with a balanced layout, high-fidelity keycap aesthetics, and smooth hover animations.

Fixes & Improvements

  • UI Refresh: Comprehensive theme adjustments across the shortcuts pane for a more premium experience.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.22.

item.title: Version 2.0.21
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.21

Features

  • Premium WebView Accordion: Upgraded <details> and <summary> elements with glassmorphism styling, rotating chevrons, and smooth expansion animations.
  • Premium Table Experience: Modernized markdown tables with rounded corners, zebra striping, and interactive row hover effects.
  • Enhanced Task Lists: Added custom styling for markdown task list checkboxes with a modern look and feel.
  • Navigation History: Introduced navigation history support within the Knowledge Library for easier back-and-forth movement.
  • Internal Note Linking: Support for standard markdown wiki-links [[Note Title]] and shadow-note:// links within the markdown view.
  • Advanced Diagramming: Full support for DBML (Database Markup Language) rendering and improved Graphviz/Mermaid integration.
  • Legacy IFrame Fixes: Resolved origin issues for YouTube and other external iframes to ensure smooth playback and rendering.
  • Hard Breaks: Implemented "Hard Breaks" for single newlines in markdown to match premium editor expectations.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Snapshot Stability: Improved stability of UI snapshot tests and refined view rendering callbacks.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout efficiency in the persistent WebView.
  • UI Refresh: Comprehensive theme adjustments across the Knowledge Library, including refined padding for admonitions and code blocks.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.19.

item.title: Version 2.0.20
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.20

Features

  • Premium WebView Accordion: Upgraded <details> and <summary> elements with glassmorphism styling, rotating chevrons, and smooth expansion animations.
  • Enhanced Task Lists: Added custom styling for markdown task list checkboxes with a modern look and feel.
  • Navigation History: Introduced navigation history support within the Knowledge Library for easier back-and-forth movement.
  • Internal Note Linking: Support for standard markdown wiki-links [[Note Title]] and shadow-note:// links within the markdown view.
  • Advanced Diagramming: Full support for DBML (Database Markup Language) rendering and improved Graphviz/Mermaid integration.
  • Legacy IFrame Fixes: Resolved origin issues for YouTube and other external iframes to ensure smooth playback and rendering.
  • Hard Breaks: Implemented "Hard Breaks" for single newlines in markdown to match premium editor expectations.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Snapshot Stability: Improved stability of UI snapshot tests and refined view rendering callbacks.
  • WebView Performance: Optimized markdown rendering and layout efficiency in the persistent WebView.
  • UI Refresh: Comprehensive theme adjustments across the Knowledge Library, including refined padding for admonitions and code blocks.
  • Version Update: Bumped application version to 2.0.19.

item.title: Version 2.0.18
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.18

  • Rich Markdown Engine: Introduced a powerful new web-based markdown renderer for notes, offering beautifully formatted text and drastically improved performance.
  • Advanced Diagrams: Automatically render dbml, mermaid, dot, and graphviz diagrams directly inline with your notes.
  • Source View Toggle: Easily flip between your rendered diagrams and their raw source code with a single click using the new </> Source button.
  • Syntax Highlighting: Enjoy beautiful code formatting for all programming languages using the premium Atom One Dark theme.
  • Math Support: Native rendering of mathematical equations and formulas using KaTeX.
  • Performance: Optimized markdown rendering layout and robust local-scheme handling for better stability and smoother scrolling.

item.title: Version 2.0.17
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.17

  • Rich Markdown Engine: Introduced a powerful new web-based markdown renderer for notes, offering beautifully formatted text and drastically improved performance.
  • Advanced Diagrams: Automatically render mermaid, dot, and graphviz diagrams directly inline with your notes.
  • Source View Toggle: Easily flip between your rendered diagrams and their raw source code with a single click using the new </> Source button.
  • Syntax Highlighting: Enjoy beautiful code formatting for all programming languages using the premium Atom One Dark theme.
  • Math Support: Native rendering of mathematical equations and formulas using KaTeX.

item.title: Version 2.0.13
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.13

  • Minor Bug Fixes: Addressed various small issues and improved overall stability.

item.title: Version 2.0.12
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.12

  • Premium Slate UI: Redesigned Knowledge Library with a sophisticated "Deep Slate" palette, elite typography (1.6x line-height), and spacious 32pt gutters for professional clarity.
  • Tactile Interaction: Refined note rows with solid mechanical borders and spring-based micro-animations for a highly responsive, premium feel.

item.title: Version 2.0.11
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.11

  • Premium Slate UI: Redesigned Knowledge Library with a sophisticated "Deep Slate" palette, elite typography (1.6x line-height), and spacious 32pt gutters for professional clarity.
  • Tactile Interaction: Refined note rows with solid mechanical borders and spring-based micro-animations for a highly responsive, premium feel.

item.title: Version 2.0.10
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.10

  • Full Video Support: The integrated browser now fully supports HTML5 fullscreen, letting you enjoy YouTube and other media without limitations.
  • Smart Fullscreen Controls: Native window controls now move into the command bar during fullscreen, keeping your workspace clean and productive.
  • High-Contrast UI: Refined window control visibility for high contrast across all themes, including deep black backgrounds.
  • Modernized Core: Optimized for macOS 13+ with behind-the-scenes improvements for a smoother, more responsive interface.

item.title: Version 2.0.9
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.9

  • Sleeker Navigation: Window controls are now built directly into the main toolbar for a more integrated and professional feel.
  • More Screen Space: We've removed the bulky title bar, pushing the interface to the very top to give you more room for your work.
  • Sharp, Modern Design: Updated the app with a clean, sharp-edged look for a more focused and modern aesthetic.
  • Fixed Accidental Dragging: Resolved an issue where clicking the app's background would move the window, keeping your workspace stable.
  • Faster Experience: Behind-the-scenes optimizations make the window and interface feel smoother and more responsive.

item.title: Version 2.0.6
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.6

  • Bug Fix: Fixed an issue where clicking anywhere in the app background would unintentionally drag the entire window.

item.title: Version 2.0.5
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.5

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.

item.title: Version 2.0.4
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.4

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.

item.title: Version 2.0.1
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.1

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.

item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.1

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.

item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.0

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.0.0

  • New feature: Added a dedicated Updates section in Settings.
